channel.title: Comments on: BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/bridgeport-brewing-summer-squeeze-169/comment-page-1/#comment-1539">Mike</a>.
Thanks Mike! Now that i'm back "home", i do plan on more vists in your direction, especially Ommegang and my friends at the Cooperstown Brewing Company. I haven't had Flower Power, but now that you mention it, I may have to make a trip to Wegmans today and grab it :) Thanks again for taking the time to not only watch our episodes, but comment as well!!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Mike.

Thanks Mike! Now that i’m back “home”, i do plan on more vists in your direction, especially Ommegang and my friends at the Cooperstown Brewing Company. I haven’t had Flower Power, but now that you mention it, I may have to make a trip to Wegmans today and grab it 🙂 Thanks again for taking the time to not only watch our episodes, but comment as well!!

item.title: By: Mike
item.dc:creator: Mike
item.description: Nice job, guys. As a former resident of Upstate New York (Oneonta), I really appreciate the exposure that you give to the "smaller" brewers out there! You should "go back home" Paul and do a few more Ommegang selections, or even Ithaca Beer Company (Flower Power!!!)
item.content:encoded: Nice job, guys. As a former resident of Upstate New York (Oneonta), I really appreciate the exposure that you give to the “smaller” brewers out there! You should “go back home” Paul and do a few more Ommegang selections, or even Ithaca Beer Company (Flower Power!!!)

item.title: By: Paul Leone
item.dc:creator: Paul Leone
item.description: You rock Frank, we sooooo appreciate you visting and watching our little vlogs!
item.content:encoded: You rock Frank, we sooooo appreciate you visting and watching our little vlogs!

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description:
Paul & John thanks. I am not one to do a lot of posting etc but every now and then I pop up and let you know I am enjoying the work you 2 are doing and I have not missed an episode, at least that I know of.
Frank Savannah
item.content:encoded:
Paul & John thanks. I am not one to do a lot of posting etc but every now and then I pop up and let you know I am enjoying the work you 2 are doing and I have not missed an episode, at least that I know of.

Frank
Savannah

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/bridgeport-brewing-summer-squeeze-169/comment-page-1/#comment-1529">Thomas Rowe/ The Beer Doctor</a>.
Thanks for the comment Dr! I've never heard of Hudapohl, but now I need to look for it. My favorite all time summer beer is still Bells Oberon, but unfortunately I can't get it in upstate NY. Cheers to your summer and thanks again!!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Thomas Rowe/ The Beer Doctor.

Thanks for the comment Dr! I’ve never heard of Hudapohl, but now I need to look for it. My favorite all time summer beer is still Bells Oberon, but unfortunately I can’t get it in upstate NY. Cheers to your summer and thanks again!!

item.title: By: Thomas Rowe/ The Beer Doctor
item.dc:creator: Thomas Rowe/ The Beer Doctor
item.description: Excellent episode. Here in southwestern Ohio, my go-to summer beer is Hudepohl Summer Pils. A delicious pure lager that produces citrus notes, using only the four ingredients. Hope you get a chance to check it out. Cheers! The Beer Doctor
item.content:encoded:
Excellent episode. Here in southwestern Ohio, my go-to summer beer is Hudepohl Summer Pils. A delicious pure lager that produces citrus notes, using only the four ingredients. Hope you get a chance to check it out. Cheers!
The Beer Doctor
